Industrial Production and Capacity Utilization

Release Date: January 17, 2025

Industrial Production Indexes (2017=100) and Capacity Utilization Rates (percent)

Table 1. Industrial Production Indexes and Capacity Utilization
Period Total Industry Manufacturing Mining
Index % of capacity Index % of capacity Index % of capacity
2024-10 102.4 78.6 100.8 76.3 118.2 91.5
2024-11 103.1 79.2 101.5 77.0 119.0 92.1
2024-12 104.0 79.8 102.3 77.5 n.a. n.a.
1/ Data for the most recent month are preliminary.
2/ Seasonally adjusted.

Index % of capacity Index % of capacity
